description: A static JSON-based API serving movie catalogs, genres/languages filter options, and direct video streaming links (MP4/MKV). Designed for serverless websites and AI integrations.

movies_index.description: Get the complete movie index list. Contains the metadata and streaming URLs for all movies.

filters.description: Get all genres, countries, and languages lists to build the UI filter menus.

movie_detail_by_id.description: Get the full details of a single movie by replacing {id} with the movie's ID. Contains the direct video stream links (stream_url_1080p).

movie_model.id: String (UUID) - Unique identifier of the movie
movie_model.title: String - Title of the movie
movie_model.thumbnail_url: String - Image link for the poster/thumbnail
movie_model.is_premium: Boolean - True if it is a VIP movie
movie_model.genres: Array of Objects - List of genres (name, slug)
movie_model.stream_url_1080p: String (URL) - Direct MP4/MKV video link to play the movie in 1080p
movie_model.stream_url_720p: String (URL) - Direct video link for 720p (if available)
movie_model.stream_url_480p: String (URL) - Direct video link for 480p (if available)
